title: ensaYOnesa
description:
ensaYOnesa is an offline-first Progressive Web App for writing, formatting, previewing, and exporting essays as print-ready PDFs. It provides a local-first editorial workspace with cover-page metadata, chapter and subsection structure, inline citations, images, live preview, and browser-based PDF export.

Source code repository: https://github.com/AceOptimeFlows/ensayonesa
